_comment: Ryujin rift reveal — plays right AFTER riftdragon start (gym/rift_start runs the summon first, so skipping the scene can never lose the dragon). The camera lifts off beside Leader Ryujin (2264/210/1090), climbs toward the rift anchor (2267/343/963) as the dragon emerges, holds on the tear, then drops back. NO ambientWeather on purpose: RiftDragonManager already owns the storm sky and the scene must not restore over it. Absolute coords — TODO(showrunner): nudge keyframes if the keep skyline clips the path.
